extraction.one_line_summary: MELLIER Tim won a chaotic sprint from a 25-rider front group after a crash 150m from the line eliminated Ewan and Sagan.
tactical_patterns: Alpecin-Fenix controlled finale despite van der Poel in yellow, delivered Phillips then Mellier won from reduced group.
Break caught inside final 10km on supposed sprint stage indicates high pace orchestrated by sprint teams.
Multiple crashes splintered peloton into 25-rider front group before finale, suggesting positioning errors by major sprint teams.

rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: positive: retained yellow jersey and actively led out teammates Phillips/Mellier despite GC responsibilities
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: caught in 150m-to-go crash, appeared seriously injured and possibly out of Tour
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: caught in same final 150m crash, denied sprint opportunity from favorable front position
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: lost time in finale crashes, dropped from top 10 GC on flat stage
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: early crash with dislocated shoulder put back in, lost 52 seconds despite teammate assistance
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: negative: caught behind late crash, lost time on flat stage despite no mechanical issues
